title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Retail
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
